expression.expression: (CASE WHEN ((in0.NDOD_3 = in1.LEG_NDOD) AND (in0.TT_NDOD = in1.TT_NDOD)) THEN in1.PAX ELSE NULL END)
(CASE WHEN ((in0.NDOD_5 = in1.LEG_NDOD) AND (in0.TT_NDOD = in1.TT_NDOD)) THEN in1.PAX ELSE NULL END)

CAST((
  CASE
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS string) IN ('AZ', 'CA', 'NV', 'UT'))
      THEN 'CA '
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_2 AS string) IN ('AZ', 'CA', 'NV', 'UT'))
      THEN 'CA '
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_3 AS string) IN ('AZ', 'CA', 'NV', 'UT'))
      THEN 'CA '
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS string) IN ('ID', 'OR', 'WA'))
      THEN 'PNW'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_2 AS string) IN ('ID', 'OR', 'WA'))
      THEN 'PNW'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_3 AS string) IN ('ID', 'OR', 'WA'))
      THEN 'PNW'
    WHEN (DEST_STATE = 'AK')
      THEN 'AK '
    WHEN (DEST_STATE_2 = 'AK')
      THEN 'AK '
    WHEN (DEST_STATE_3 = 'AK')
      THEN 'AK '
    ELSE 'HI '
  END
) AS string)

(
  CASE
    WHEN (TT_TARIFF = 378)
      THEN 111
    WHEN ((TT_TARIFF = 3) AND ((ORIG_COUNTRY = 'JP') OR (DEST_COUNTRY = 'JP')))
      THEN 500
    WHEN ((TT_TARIFF = 3) AND ((ORIG_COUNTRY = 'KR') OR (DEST_COUNTRY = 'KR')))
      THEN 1000
    WHEN (
      (
        (
          ((TT_TARIFF = 3) AND ((ORIG_COUNTRY = 'AU') OR (DEST_COUNTRY = 'AU')))
          OR ((TT_TARIFF = 3) AND ((ORIG_COUNTRY = 'NZ') OR (DEST_COUNTRY = 'NZ')))
        )
        OR ((TT_TARIFF = 3) AND ((ORIG_COUNTRY = 'CK') OR (DEST_COUNTRY = 'CK')))
      )
      OR ((TT_TARIFF = 3) AND ((ORIG_COUNTRY = 'PF') OR (DEST_COUNTRY = 'PF')))
    )
      THEN 510
    WHEN (TT_TARIFF = 3)
      THEN NULL
    WHEN (TT_TARIFF = 5)
      THEN 96
    WHEN (TT_TARIFF = 40)
      THEN 86
    WHEN ((((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND (ORIG_STATE = 'AK')) AND (DEST_STATE = 'AK')) AND (ROUTING = 'AK'))
      THEN 6
    WHEN (((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND (ORIG_STATE = 'AK')) AND (DEST_STATE = 'AK'))
      THEN NULL
    WHEN (
      (
        ((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND ((ORIG_STATE = 'AK') OR (DEST_STATE = 'AK')))
        AND ((ORIG = 'PAE') OR (DEST = 'PAE'))
      )
      AND (ROUTING = 'AK')
    )
      THEN 16
    WHEN (((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND ((ORIG_STATE = 'AK') OR (DEST_STATE = 'AK'))) AND (ROUTING = 'AK'))
      THEN 114
    WHEN (((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND ((ORIG_STATE = 'HI') OR (DEST_STATE = 'HI'))) AND (ROUTING = 'CA'))
      THEN 33
    WHEN (
      (((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND ((ORIG_STATE = 'HI') OR (DEST_STATE = 'HI'))) AND (ROUTING = 'PNW'))
      OR (((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND ((ORIG_STATE = 'HI') OR (DEST_STATE = 'HI'))) AND (ROUTING = 'HI'))
    )
      THEN 14
    WHEN (((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND ((ORIG_STATE = 'AK') OR (DEST_STATE = 'AK'))) AND (ROUTING = 'PNW'))
      THEN 16
    WHEN ((TT_TARIFF = 0) AND (ROUTING = 'PNW'))
      THEN 56
    WHEN ((TT_TARIFF = 0) AND (ROUTING = 'CA'))
      THEN 66
    ELSE NULL
  END
)
(CASE WHEN (TT_PAX IS NULL) THEN 0 ELSE TT_PAX END)

condition.expression: (((((NOT (ORIG = DEST_2)) OR (ORIG IS NULL)) OR (DEST_2 IS NULL)) AND ((((DEST_STATE = 'WA') OR (DEST_STATE = 'OR')) OR ((DEST_STATE = 'ID') OR (DEST_STATE = 'AK'))) OR (((DEST_STATE = 'CA') OR (DEST_STATE = 'NV')) OR ((DEST_STATE = 'AZ') OR ((DEST_STATE = 'UT') OR (DEST_STATE = 'HI')))))) AND (((((DEST_STATE = 'AK') OR (NOT (ORIG_STATE = 'AK'))) OR (ORIG_STATE IS NULL)) OR (NOT (DEST_STATE = 'AK'))) OR (DEST_STATE IS NULL)))

expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN ((TT_ROUTING = 114) AND (NOT (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(TT_PATH), '')), LOWER('-ANC-'))))) THEN 14 WHEN (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(TT_PATH), '')), LOWER('NRT-SEA'))) THEN 555 WHEN (CONTAINS((coalesce(LOWER(TT_PATH), '')), LOWER('SEA-NRT'))) THEN 555 ELSE TT_ROUTING END) AS INTEGER)

CAST((CASE WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS string) IN ('AZ', 'CA', 'NV', 'UT')) THEN 'CA ' WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_2 AS string) IN ('AZ', 'CA', 'NV', 'UT')) THEN 'CA ' WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS string) IN ('ID', 'OR', 'WA')) THEN 'PNW' WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_2 AS string) IN ('ID', 'OR', 'WA')) THEN 'PNW' WHEN (DEST_STATE = 'AK') THEN 'AK ' WHEN (DEST_STATE_2 = 'AK') THEN 'AK ' ELSE 'HI ' END) AS string)

CAST((
  CASE
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS string) IN ('AZ', 'CA', 'NV', 'UT'))
      THEN 'CA '
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_2 AS string) IN ('AZ', 'CA', 'NV', 'UT'))
      THEN 'CA '
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_3 AS string) IN ('AZ', 'CA', 'NV', 'UT'))

    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_4 AS string) IN ('AZ', 'CA', 'NV', 'UT'))
      THEN 'CA '
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS string) IN ('ID', 'OR', 'WA'))
      THEN 'PNW'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_2 AS string) IN ('ID', 'OR', 'WA'))
      THEN 'PNW'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_3 AS string) IN ('ID', 'OR', 'WA'))
      THEN 'PNW'
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE_4 AS string) IN ('ID', 'OR', 'WA'))
      THEN 'PNW'
    WHEN (DEST_STATE = 'AK')
      THEN 'AK '
    WHEN (DEST_STATE_2 = 'AK')
      THEN 'AK '
    WHEN (DEST_STATE_3 = 'AK')
      THEN 'AK '
    WHEN (DEST_STATE_4 = 'AK')
      THEN 'AK '
    ELSE 'HI '
  END
) AS string)

condition.expression: (((((NOT (ORIG = DEST_3)) OR (ORIG IS NULL)) OR (DEST_3 IS NULL)) AND (((NOT (DEST = DEST_3)) OR (DEST IS NULL)) OR (DEST_3 IS NULL))) AND ((((DEST_STATE_2 = 'WA') OR (DEST_STATE_2 = 'OR')) OR ((DEST_STATE_2 = 'ID') OR (DEST_STATE_2 = 'AK'))) OR (((DEST_STATE_2 = 'CA') OR (DEST_STATE_2 = 'NV')) OR ((DEST_STATE_2 = 'AZ') OR ((DEST_STATE_2 = 'UT') OR (DEST_STATE_2 = 'HI'))))))

CAST((CASE WHEN ((LENGTH(ADD_ON_2)) < 6) THEN NULL ELSE ADD_ON_2 END) AS string)
CAST((CASE WHEN ((LENGTH(ADD_ON_3)) < 6) THEN NULL ELSE ADD_ON_3 END) AS string)

condition.expression: ((NOT ((CAST(TT_TARIFF AS DOUBLE) = 3) OR (CAST(TT_TARIFF AS DOUBLE) = 378))) OR (((CAST(TT_TARIFF AS DOUBLE) = 3) OR (CAST(TT_TARIFF AS DOUBLE) = 378)) IS NULL))

expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN ((PAX_1 IS NULL) AND (NDOD_1 IS NOT NULL)) THEN '0' ELSE PAX_1 END) AS DOUBLE)
CAST((CASE WHEN ((PAX_2 IS NULL) AND (NDOD_2 IS NOT NULL)) THEN '0' ELSE PAX_2 END) AS DOUBLE)

(FIRST_VALUE(SHORTENED_REGION) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST))

CAST((CASE WHEN (TT_TARIFF = 0) THEN 'Y' WHEN ((TT_TARIFF = 5) AND (CAST(TRUNK_REGION AS string) IN ('LA', 'MX'))) THEN 'Y' WHEN (((TT_TARIFF = 30) AND (CAST(TRUNK_REGION AS string) IN ('AL', 'AR', 'HC', 'HP'))) OR ((TT_TARIFF = 40) AND (TRUNK_REGION = 'CD'))) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS string)

condition.expression: ((((((NOT (ORIG = DEST_4)) OR (ORIG IS NULL)) OR (DEST_4 IS NULL)) AND (((NOT (DEST = DEST_4)) OR (DEST IS NULL)) OR (DEST_4 IS NULL))) AND (((NOT (DEST_2 = DEST_4)) OR (DEST_2 IS NULL)) OR (DEST_4 IS NULL))) AND ((((DEST_STATE_3 = 'WA') OR (DEST_STATE_3 = 'OR')) OR ((DEST_STATE_3 = 'ID') OR (DEST_STATE_3 = 'AK'))) OR (((DEST_STATE_3 = 'CA') OR (DEST_STATE_3 = 'NV')) OR ((DEST_STATE_3 = 'AZ') OR ((DEST_STATE_3 = 'UT') OR (DEST_STATE_3 = 'HI'))))))
((PAX >= 1) AND (((NOT (LEG_NDOD = TT_NDOD)) OR (LEG_NDOD IS NULL)) OR (TT_NDOD IS NULL)))

expression.expression: CAST(((CASE WHEN ((((TOTAL_LEG_MILES / TT_MILES) / 0.001) < 0) AND ((((TOTAL_LEG_MILES / TT_MILES) / 0.001) - FLOOR(((TOTAL_LEG_MILES / TT_MILES) / 0.001))) = 0.5)) THEN CEIL(((TOTAL_LEG_MILES / TT_MILES) / 0.001)) ELSE CAST(ROUND(((TOTAL_LEG_MILES / TT_MILES) / 0.001)) AS DECIMAL(19, 0)) END) * 0.001) AS DOUBLE)
CAST((CASE WHEN (ORIG < DEST) THEN (CONCAT(ORIG, DEST)) ELSE (CONCAT(DEST, ORIG)) END) AS string)
(CASE WHEN ((in0.NDOD_1 = in1.LEG_NDOD) AND (in0.TT_NDOD = in1.TT_NDOD)) THEN in1.PAX ELSE NULL END)

CAST((CASE WHEN (RUNTOT_RANK = 1) THEN 'TRUNK   ' WHEN (RUNTOT_RANK = 2) THEN 'ADD-ON 1' WHEN (RUNTOT_RANK = 3) THEN 'ADD-ON 2' WHEN (RUNTOT_RANK = 4) THEN 'ADD-ON 3' WHEN (RUNTOT_RANK = 5) THEN 'ADD-ON 4' ELSE NULL END) AS string)

(
  CASE
    WHEN ((MIN_REGION_RANK = -1) AND ((ORIG = 'PPG') OR (DEST = 'PPG')))
      THEN 378
    WHEN (MIN_REGION_RANK = -1)
      THEN 3
    WHEN ((ORIG_COUNTRY IS NULL) OR (CAST(ORIG_COUNTRY AS string) NOT IN ('CA', 'US')))
      THEN 5
    WHEN ((DEST_COUNTRY IS NULL) OR (CAST(DEST_COUNTRY AS string) NOT IN ('CA', 'US')))
      THEN 5
    WHEN (
      ((ORIG_COUNTRY IS NULL) OR (ORIG_COUNTRY <> 'US'))
      OR ((DEST_COUNTRY IS NULL) OR (DEST_COUNTRY <> 'US'))
    )
      THEN 40
    WHEN (CAST(ORIG_STATE AS string) IN ('AK', 'HI'))
      THEN 30
    WHEN (CAST(DEST_STATE AS string) IN ('AK', 'HI'))
      THEN 30
    ELSE 0
  END
)

CAST((CASE WHEN (STOPS = 1) THEN (CONCAT(ORIG, '-', CNX, '-', DEST)) WHEN (STOPS = 2) THEN (CONCAT(ORIG, '-', CNX, '-', CNX_2, '-', DEST)) WHEN (STOPS = 3) THEN (CONCAT(ORIG, '-', CNX, '-', CNX_2, '-', CNX_3, '-', DEST)) WHEN (STOPS = 4) THEN (CONCAT(ORIG, '-', CNX, '-', CNX_2, '-', CNX_3, '-', CNX_4, '-', DEST)) ELSE NULL END) AS string)
CAST((CASE WHEN (ORIG < DEST) THEN TT_OD ELSE CAST((CONCAT(DEST, ORIG)) AS string) END) AS string)

(CASE WHEN (STOPS = 1) THEN (CONCAT(MILES, MILES_2)) WHEN (STOPS = 2) THEN (CONCAT(MILES, MILES_2, MILES_3)) WHEN (STOPS = 3) THEN (CONCAT(MILES, MILES_2, MILES_3, MILES_4)) WHEN (STOPS = 4) THEN (CONCAT(MILES, MILES_2, MILES_3, MILES_4, MILES_5)) ELSE NULL END)
